items.title: South Africa's Adams, who played at WC, dies at 25...
items.summary: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams has died aged 25, the South African Football Players Union has confirmed.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ⭐ Stars are out! Wimbledon celebrity sightings
items.summary: Andrew Garfield and Martina Navratilova were also among celebrities who made appearances at Wimbledon.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England v India: fifth men’s T20 international start delayed – live
